visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit indoor space with a grey wall and studio lighting equipment in the background. A man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a blue quilted vest stands next to a woman in a vibrant yellow puffer jacket. She gestures dynamically towards the camera with her hands, exhibiting a wide-eyed, enthusiastic expression. (2) The man and woman turn and begin rubbing their shoulders and backs against each other rhythmically. The man smiles broadly while the woman maintains an energetic facial expression. A magenta circular graphic with '18禁' appears over their chests. (3) They stop rubbing and extend their index fingers toward each other slowly. Their faces show anticipation. As their fingertips touch, no visual effect occurs. The woman's expression shifts to a mock-serious, flat look, while a laughing emoji graphic appears above her head. (4) The camera cuts to a close-up of their fingers touching against a neutral grey wall. The woman looks at the camera with a disappointed pout. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the frame. (5) A new scene features a younger woman with long dark hair wearing a grey cardigan and a tan top. She looks surprised, mouth open, gesturing toward the left. (6) She and another individual (only back visible, wearing a dark turtleneck) perform the same back-rubbing motion against a white wall. (7) A close-up shows their fingers approaching. Upon contact, a small white electrical spark graphic and several yellow star icons appear, indicating a successful static discharge.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 想知道我們結婚10年. (2) [Subtitle]: 都如何保持愛的火花嗎? (3) [Subtitle]: 用摩擦! (4) [Variety]: 18禁. (5) [Variety]: (傻眼). (6) [Subtitle]: 沒有啊? (7) [Subtitle]: 10年了! 不來電了! (8) [Subtitle]: 怎麼可能!! 我們來試試看! (9) [Slogan]: 趕快來試試看吧!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, 1 younger female guest, and 1 person shown from the back.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man in a blue vest and flat cap, a middle-aged woman in a yellow puffer jacket, and a younger woman in a grey cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor environment featuring a grey sofa, minimalist wall art, a professional 'Nicefoto' softbox studio light, and a plain white wall area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals begin with a bright, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM featuring a driving 4-on-the-floor beat. The vocal pitch is high with an excited tone. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX occurs as a male voice interjects with a punchy, comedic delivery. (3) Rhythmic, high-frequency rustling sounds of clothing friction are prominent for several seconds, accompanied by faint female laughter in the background. (4) A 'boing' cartoon sound effect plays during a pause in speech. (5) A muffled 'thud' or low-bandwidth tap sound occurs as fingers supposedly touch, followed immediately by a comedic 'descending slide' SFX indicating failure. (6) A different female voice enters with high arousal and a surprised pitch contour. (7) Vigorous fabric rustling sounds return, more intense than before. (8) A high-pitched, resonant 'Ding' or 'Spark' SFX with a crystalline texture sounds clearly at the climax, followed by a triumphant musical stinger as the BGM volume swells slightly to the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a humorous social media challenge comparing the 'spark' (static electricity) between a long-married couple and a younger pair, using a physical science experiment as a comedic metaphor for relationship chemistry.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form video editing tropes including variety-show text overlays and sound effects to drive engagement.
